items.title: Presentation: Trustworthy Productivity: Securing AI-Accelerated Development
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Trustworthy Productivity: Securing AI-Accelerated Development. Sriram Madapusi Vasudevan discusses industry-converging patterns for securing autonomous AI agents in production.

items.title: Elastic Open-Sources Atlas Agent Memory Based on Cognitive Science
items.summaryShort: Elastic Open-Sources Atlas Agent Memory Based on Cognitive Science. Elastic open-sourced Atlas, a system built on Elasticsearch that maintains three categories of memory for agents.

items.title: Microsoft Brings AI-Powered Vulnerability Remediation to Azure DevOps with Copilot Autofix
items.summaryShort: Microsoft Brings AI-Powered Vulnerability Remediation to Azure DevOps with Copilot Autofix. Microsoft has announced the limited public preview of Copilot Autofix for GitHub Advanced Security for Azure DevOps, extending AI-powered vulnerabil

items.title: AWS Launches Lambda MicroVMs for Isolated Agent and User Code Execution
items.summaryShort: AWS Launches Lambda MicroVMs for Isolated Agent and User Code Execution. AWS launched Lambda MicroVMs, a new serverless compute primitive that runs each user session or AI agent in its own Firecracker virtual machine with hardware-level iso

items.title: Article: Scaling Java-Based Real-Time Systems: The Hidden Tradeoffs of Event-Driven Design
items.summaryShort: Article: Scaling Java-Based Real-Time Systems: The Hidden Tradeoffs of Event-Driven Design. Event-driven architecture promises scalability, but in Java-based real-time systems the tradeoffs only surface in production.

items.title: The “Father of the Internet” is finally retiring
items.summaryShort: The “Father of the Internet” is finally retiring. Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.

items.title: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models
items.summaryShort: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models. Anthropic said it would begin restoring access to the Fable on July 1.

items.title: Wayve launches $85M employee tender offer at $8.5B valuation
items.summaryShort: Wayve launches $85M employee tender offer at $8.5B valuation. Wayve’s offering is part of a growing trend of AI startups using employee tenders as a strategic tool to attract and retain talent.
